Tuleva Savers Analysis — Members vs Non-Members¶

Comparison of Tuleva members and non-member savers across AUM, withdrawals, savings behavior, demographics, and personas.

Data source: Metabase question 2324 (all savers)

Connected to https://metabase.tuleva.ee

Total savers: 97,302
  Members:     9,616
  Non-members: 87,686

Total AUM: 1370.2 M EUR
  Members:     448.1 M EUR
  Non-members: 922.1 M EUR

=== MEMBER PERSONAS ===

--- POWER SAVER (2,515 savers, 26% of members, 47% of AUM) ---
  Typical: 42-year-old, earns 4,301 EUR/month, 83,626 EUR avg AUM
  Gender:  60% M
  III pillar adoption: 100%, voluntary higher rate: 100%, avg III contrib: 5,193 EUR/year
  Left Tuleva: 6%

9. Tuleva vs kogu turg¶

Võrdlus kogu Eesti II ja III samba turuga (pensionikeskuse andmed, 2025 lõpp). Turuandmed sisaldavad kõiki ~925K isikut, kes on kunagi II või III sambaga liitunud.

Total market: 882,564 people (514,684 with balance)
  II pillar: 469,736 (53%)
  III pillar: 148,707 (17%)
  Both pillars: 103,759 (12%)
  Total AUM: 7.9B EUR
  Mean AUM (active): 15,307 EUR
Out[31]:
